seo.title: International SEO implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping International SEO projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist provides a technical framework for deploying multi-language and multi-region web applications. It focuses on ensuring search engine crawlers correctly identify, index, and serve the appropriate localized content to users while avoiding duplicate content penalties.

items.title: Standardize URL Structure
items.description: Confirm the site uses a consistent pattern (subdirectories like /en-us/, subdomains like fr.example.com, or ccTLDs like example.de) and does not mix patterns across regions.

items.title: Translate URL Slugs
items.description: Verify that URL paths are translated into the target language (e.g., /en/services vs /fr/services) to improve CTR and keyword relevance.

items.title: Validate Localized Canonicals
items.description: Ensure each localized page contains a self-referencing canonical tag pointing to its own URL, rather than pointing back to the default language version.

items.title: Enforce UTF-8 Encoding
items.description: Check that all localized URLs and slugs are properly UTF-8 encoded to support non-Latin characters in the browser address bar.

items.title: Root Domain Logic
items.description: Verify that the root domain (example.com/) either provides a language selector or uses server-side detection to redirect to the most appropriate localized subdirectory.

items.title: Self-Referencing Hreflang Tags
items.description: Verify that every page includes a link tag in the <head> or HTTP header that points to itself with the correct language/region code.

items.title: Reciprocal Link Verification
items.description: Confirm that if Page A points to Page B via hreflang, Page B must point back to Page A. Missing reciprocals will cause Google to ignore the tags.

items.title: ISO Code Validation
items.description: Check that language codes use ISO 639-1 format and optional region codes use ISO 3166-1 Alpha 2 format (e.g., 'en-gb' is valid, 'en-uk' is not).

items.title: Implement x-default Tag
items.description: Add an hreflang='x-default' tag for each page to specify the fallback URL for users whose language/region does not match any specified versions.

items.title: Sitemap Hreflang Mapping
items.description: If using XML sitemaps for hreflang, ensure each <url> entry contains <xhtml:link> child elements for every available localized version of that URL.

items.title: Disable IP-Based Automatic Redirects
items.description: Ensure the server does not automatically redirect users based on IP address, as this prevents search engine bots (often crawling from US IPs) from accessing localized versions.

items.title: Content-Language HTTP Header
items.description: Verify the server sends the correct Content-Language header in the HTTP response matching the intended locale of the page.

items.title: Robots.txt Accessibility
items.description: Audit the robots.txt file to ensure no localized subdirectories or subdomains are accidentally blocked from crawling.

items.title: Search Console Property Setup
items.description: Verify that separate properties or 'Domain Properties' are configured in Google Search Console to monitor performance per region.

items.title: Internal Link Localization
items.description: Check that all internal links on a localized page (e.g., /es/page-1) point to other localized pages (/es/page-2) rather than the default language.

items.title: Translate Metadata
items.description: Verify that <title> tags and <meta name='description'> tags are uniquely translated for every language version.

items.title: Localized Structured Data
items.description: Check that JSON-LD Schema.org markup (e.g., Product, Article) uses the localized language for string-based fields like 'name' and 'description'.

items.title: Format Numbers and Currencies
items.description: Confirm that decimal separators, currency symbols, and date formats (DD/MM/YYYY vs MM/DD/YYYY) match the specific target region.

items.title: Image Alt Text Translation
items.description: Inspect tags to ensure alt attributes are translated to provide context for localized image search.

items.title: Remove Untranslated Placeholders
items.description: Scan for 'ghost' content or hardcoded strings that remain in the source language within the localized UI.

items.title: HTML Lang Attribute
items.description: Verify the <html lang='...'> attribute is dynamically updated to match the language of the current page content.

items.title: Crawlable Language Switcher
items.description: Ensure the language/region selector uses standard <a> tags with href attributes rather than solely relying on JavaScript click handlers.

items.title: Font Glyph Support
items.description: Test that the CSS font-stack includes support for specific characters in target languages (e.g., Cyrillic, Greek, or CJK characters).

items.title: Preserve Path on Switch
items.description: Verify that switching languages takes the user to the translated version of the current page, not a redirect to the localized homepage.

items.title: Regional Compliance Banners
items.description: Ensure cookie consent and GDPR/CCPA banners are displayed and translated according to the legal requirements of the target region.
